name: package-watchdog
description: Checks for system and Flatpak updates and notifies you via native GNOME Shell notifications, with a top panel indicator showing live update status.

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && tsx build.ts && cp metadata.json dist/ && cp -r schemas dist/
scripts.pack: pnpm run build && glib-compile-schemas dist/schemas/ && gnome-extensions pack --extra-source=dist/schemas --force dist/
scripts.deploy: pnpm run pack && gnome-extensions install --force package-watchdog@oliwebd.github.com.shell-extension.zip && gnome-extensions enable package-watchdog@oliwebd.github.com
